description: Vintage style sandal boot from catwalk - the first of its kind stocked in myntra. If you're looking for the very latest fashionable sandal then your search is over! Upper Synthetic thong style straps and criss-crossing midfoot and ankle straps Floral canvas covering the ankle with a Velcro closure Padded footbed Outsole TPU outsole with a floral lug for heel Sandal care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
